zh.lifeSummary: 當Béatrix de Rodez於大約1273年出生在法國米迪-列內斯艾維倫羅德茲時，她的父親comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodez39歲，母親Mascarose de Comminges15歲。她於1295年11月17日與Bernard de la Tour d'Auvergne III在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o拉 圖-達奧維結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1309年2月20日在法國奧其坦尼艾維倫羅德茲享年37歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Béatrix de Rodez于大约1273年出生在法国米迪-列內斯艾維倫羅德茲时，她的父亲comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodez39岁，母亲Mascarose de Comminges15岁。她于1295年11月17日与Bernard de la Tour d'Auvergne III在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o拉 圖-達奧維结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1309年2月20日在法国奧其坦尼艾維倫羅德茲享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rodez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Catalan (Rodés): habitational name from any of several places called Rodés, mainly those in El Pallars and El Conflent districts, in northern Catalonia.
Catalan: variant of Roda , from Catalan rodes, plural of roda ‘wheel’.
English: variant of   Rhodes  . Compare   Rhode  .

variants.name: Rudes
meanings: Americanized form of Croatian and Slovenian Rudež: nickname derived from rud ‘red, reddish’, or, alternatively, from rud ‘curly’ (standard Slovenian rod; compare Rodes ). In Croatia, the surname is also found in the form Rudeš.

variants.name: Roda
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Arturo, Francisco, Domingos, Manuel, Mario, Alfredo, Amandio, Andres, Angel, Eduardo, Elia, Gustavo, Joaquim.

Catalan: habitational name from any of various places called Roda, for example Roda de Ter, Roda de Berà, Roda de Ribagorça, from Catalan roda ‘wheel’ (from Latin rota), possibly denoting a waterwheel.
German: habitational name from any of numerous places, particularly in central eastern Germany, named Roda or Rhoda.

variants.name: Rodas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Luis, Jorge, Juan, Ana, Jaime, Rafael, Elvira, Manuel, Miguel, Raul.
Galician and Portuguese: habitational name from any of the three places in Galicia, Spain, named Rodas (in Lugo, Ourense, and Pontevedra provinces), from the plural of roda ‘wheel’.

nameMeanings.name: Béatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Béatrix de Rodez was born about 1273, in Rodez, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, France, her father, comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodez, was 39 and her mother, Mascarose de Comminges, was 15. She married Bernard de la Tour d'Auvergne III on 17 November 1295, in La Tour-d'Auvergne, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 20 February 1309, in Rodez, Aveyron, Occitanie, France, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Béatrix de Rodez est née environ 1273, à Rodez, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, France, son père, comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodez, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Mascarose de Comminges, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Bernard de la Tour d'Auvergne III le 17 novembre 1295, à La Tour-d'Auvergne, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 février 1309, à Rodez, Aveyron, Occitanie, France, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Béatrix de Rodez um 1273 in Rodez, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodez 39 und ihre Mutter Mascarose de Comminges 15. Sie hat am 17. November 1295 in La Tour-d'Auvergne, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich Bernard de la Tour d'Auvergne III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Februar 1309 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Rodez, Aveyron, Occitanie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrix de Rodez è nata il circa 1273 nel Rodez, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia, sua padre, comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodez, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Mascarose de Comminges, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Bernard de la Tour d'Auvergne III il 17 novembre 1295, nel La Tour-d'Auvergne, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 20 febbraio 1309, nel Rodez, Aveyron, Occitanie, Francia, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Rodezが約1273年にフランスミディ-プイルeンeスエイビーロンロデズで生まれた時，父comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodezは39歳，母Mascarose de Commingesは15歳であった。1295年11月17日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメラ トウル-ド'アウバーグンでBernard de la Tour d'Auvergne IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1309年2月20日にフランスオクシタニーエイビーロンロデズで37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Rodez(이)가 대략 1273년 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 에비런 로데즈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodez(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mascarose de Comminges(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1295년 11월 17일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 푸이-데-드o 라 토우-드'오버그니에서 Bernard de la Tour d'Auvergne III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1309년 2월 20일 프랑스 옥시탠이 에비런 로데즈에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrix de Rodez nasceu aproximadamente 1273, em Rodez, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, França, seu pai, comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodez, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Mascarose de Comminges, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Bernard de la Tour d'Auvergne III em 17 de novembro de 1295, em La Tour-d'Auvergne, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de fevereiro de 1309, em Rodez, Aveyron, Occitanie, França, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Béatrix de Rodez родилась около 1273 г. в местности родез, авирон, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция, её отцу по имени comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodez было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Mascarose de Comminges, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Bernard de la Tour d'Auvergne III 17 ноября 1295 г. в местности ла тоур-д'аувиргн, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 20 февраля 1309 г. в местности родез, авирон, окситани, Франция в возрасте 37 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Béatrix de Rodez nació aproximadamente 1273, en Rodez, Aveyron, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia, su papá, comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodez, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Mascarose de Comminges, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Bernard de la Tour d'Auvergne III el 17 de noviembre de 1295, en La Tour-d'Auvergne, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 20 de febrero de 1309, en Rodez, Aveyron, Occitanie, Francia, a la edad de 37 años.
